name: Data Centre Disruption
description: Attack tree modelling disruption of a modern data centre through cyber and cyber-physical attack paths
root_objective: Disrupt data centre operations causing service outage or physical damage

nodes.title: Disrupt Data Centre Operations
nodes.description: Cause significant service outage, data loss, or physical damage to data centre infrastructure

nodes.title: Compromise Management Plane
nodes.description: Gain access to hypervisor management, BMC/IPMI, or orchestration platforms

nodes.title: Exploit vCenter/ESXi Vulnerability
nodes.description: Exploit known or zero-day vulnerability in VMware vCenter or ESXi to gain hypervisor control

nodes.title: Access IPMI/BMC Interface
nodes.description: Exploit exposed or weakly-authenticated IPMI/BMC interfaces for out-of-band server control

nodes.title: Compromise Kubernetes Control Plane
nodes.description: Exploit misconfigured Kubernetes API server, etcd, or kubelet for cluster-wide control

nodes.title: Attack Cooling/Power Systems (BMS)
nodes.description: Compromise Building Management System to manipulate HVAC, cooling, or power distribution

nodes.title: Gain Access to OT/BMS Network
nodes.description: Pivot from IT network to OT/BMS network segment via misconfigured firewall rules or dual-homed hosts

nodes.title: Manipulate HVAC Setpoints
nodes.description: Alter cooling system setpoints to cause thermal shutdown of server equipment

nodes.title: Deploy Ransomware Across Infrastructure
nodes.description: Deploy ransomware to encrypt critical systems and backups simultaneously

nodes.title: Establish Persistent Access
nodes.description: Maintain persistent foothold with admin-level access to deploy payloads

nodes.title: Disable/Encrypt Backups
nodes.description: Identify and destroy or encrypt backup systems before deploying ransomware to prevent recovery

nodes.title: Exploit Remote Access Infrastructure
nodes.description: Compromise VPN, jump boxes, or remote desktop gateways used for data centre management

nodes.title: Exploit VPN Gateway Vulnerability
nodes.description: Exploit known vulnerabilities in VPN concentrators (e.g., Fortinet, Pulse Secure, Palo Alto)
